parityMeta.describes: TrainingDecision V2 normal-session parity — drives the approved Clean Input Contract pipeline (buildCleanAppDataView -> createCleanTrainingDecisionInput -> buildTrainingDecision) against the existing redacted real export to lock decisionVersion='v2', userFacing.{today,plan,training,focus,progress,record,explanation} and hiddenDebugSignals.arbitrationTrace.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Uses the existing redacted real export so the parity bar reflects a representative AppData. The decisionMetadata.templateId selects a stable template from the fixture (push-a). No raw private data is duplicated into the parity tree — only the pointer is committed.

pointer.note: Loaded by the generator with JSON.parse; the same path must be loadable by the Swift parity runner.
